'''ChandrilTech''', also known as '''Chandril Tech''', was a technology firm located on [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], known primarily for its handheld [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] devices. It also manufactured [[Droid/Legends|droid]] parts at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Among its products were the [[Elevated Binocular Sensor]] and the [[Standard Low-Power Protocol Torso]].
